lessons.title: Define the dilemma: Report the error vs. protect the doctor’s reputation.
Identify stakeholders: Patient, doctor, hospital administration.
Evaluate principles: Patient safety, honesty, loyalty to colleagues.
Consider options: Report the error, discuss with the doctor, keep quiet.
Choose a course of action: Report the error to ensure patient safety.
Justify decision: Prioritize patient safety and honesty over loyalty to colleagues
topics: Expected Standard: Moral dilemmas analyzed accordingly

lessons.title: Explain the meaning of morality.

lessons.title: After losing his job, a man from one of the compounds in Lusaka decided to rob
topics: a shop in order to make ends meet. He was arrested and sentenced to five years in
prison with hard labour. What would you have done in this situation if you were the
man instead of robbing a shop?

skills in order to present the topic effectively and confidently.
